retrievedChunks.text: Common side effects of ibuprofen include nausea.
Ibuprofen may cause dizziness and headache.
Consult your doctor if you have kidney issues before taking ibuprofen.
Aspirin is an alternative NSAID with its own side effect profile.
Do not exceed 1200mg of ibuprofen per day without supervision.

finalAnswer: Ibuprofen can cause nausea, dizziness, and stomach pain.
